behavior_summary: U8P_PUDDLE::enterFastArea is run when an actor/item enters the puddle trigger region. It checks the global rainStormActive flag and, if no rain storm is active, attempts to spawn a puddle item at the entering actor's location (using that actor's X, Y, Z and frame). If creation succeeds, it marks the new puddle with a status bitmask (0x0080). If rainStormActive is set or creation fails, it returns without creating or marking a puddle.
notable_control_flow: On entry, read global rainStormActive; if non-zero, return immediately (guard prevents puddle creation during storms).
Read trigger_item's frame and coordinates via Item::getFrame, Item::getX, Item::getY, Item::getZ to produce creation parameters.
Call Item::legal_create with constants (type/id and variant/frame) plus the fetched frame and coordinates, passing an out-parameter for the created item.
If Item::legal_create indicates failure, return without further action.
If Item::legal_create indicates success, call Item::orStatus on the created item to OR in mask 0x0080, then return.
open_questions: Precise semantic meaning of the status mask 0x0080 applied via Item::orStatus (appears to mark puddles for special processing or lifetime behavior) — confidence: medium.
Exact interpretation of the constant type/id and variant/frame passed to Item::legal_create (0x021B and 0x02BA appear used) — confidence: medium.
Whether Item::legal_create uses zero or non-zero as the canonical success return across the engine (inference from calling pattern suggests one convention) — confidence: medium.
Persistence and lifetime of the created puddle item (does it auto-expire, interact with other systems) are not determined from this script — confidence: low.

main_function.name: U8P_PUDDLE::enterFastArea
main_function.purpose: When an actor or item enters the puddle's fast-area trigger, attempt to create a puddle item at that actor's current location and mark it with a status flag, but only if no rain storm is active.
entry_conditions: Triggered by fast-area entry (U8P_PUDDLE::enterFastArea) for the puddle region.
Receives a parameter trigger_item (the entering actor/item).
Only proceeds when global rainStormActive is false/zero (guard).

function_map.name: U8P_PUDDLE::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Handle the puddle area entry event: conditionally spawn and mark a puddle item at the entering actor's location.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Read the Z (height) coordinate from the trigger_item for creation parameters.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Read the Y coordinate from the trigger_item for creation parameters.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Read the X coordinate from the trigger_item for creation parameters.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Obtain the trigger_item's frame/index to pass into the creation parameters.

function_map.name: Item::legal_create
function_map.role: Attempt to create the puddle item at a given type/variant/frame/X/Y/Z and return the created-item via an out-parameter; success/failure influences control flow.

function_map.name: Item::orStatus
function_map.role: Apply a status bitmask to the newly created puddle item (used here to OR in mask 0x0080).

external_calls.purpose: Fetch trigger_item's frame/index to pass to Item::legal_create.
Fetch trigger_item's X coordinate for puddle placement.
Fetch trigger_item's Y coordinate for puddle placement.
Fetch trigger_item's Z coordinate for puddle placement.
Attempt to create the puddle item with specific type/variant/frame and coordinates; returns created-item via out-parameter and indicates success/failure.
Apply status mask 0x0080 to the created puddle to mark it for special handling.

reads.name: rainStormActive
reads.likely_effect: When non-zero, suppress puddle creation; acts as a global guard preventing spawning of puddles during active rain storms.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_PUDDLE::enterFastArea is run when an actor/item enters the puddle trigger region. It checks the global rainStormActive flag and, if no rain storm is active, attempts to spawn a puddle item at the entering actor's location (using that actor's X, Y, Z and frame). If creation succeeds, it marks the new puddle with a status bitmask (0x0080). If rainStormActive is set or creation fails, it returns without creating or marking a puddle.
